description_long: This kiosk features a modern, rectangular structure with a prominent vertical post on one side and a wide, horizontal display panel. The front panel is adorned with a large printed sign that includes a beach scene, German text, and a logo, suggesting a tourism or informational function. Below the main sign, there are several small, dark rectangular elements that appear to be buttons or slots, as well as a metallic box likely serving as a payment or ticketing interface. The kiosk is constructed primarily from metal, with smooth, hard surfaces and a matte to slightly glossy finish. The rear and side views reveal a solid, enclosed back and sides, with no visible windows or doors. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, metal kiosk with a large printed sign, interactive front panel, and a tall vertical post on one side. The structure is sleek, solid, and designed for informational or ticketing use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large printed sign, interactive buttons or slots, and a metallic box, with the tall post on the left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the kiosk and the protruding metallic box.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back panel with no signage, windows, or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thin profile and the vertical post.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with photographic image, logo, and German text ('Willkommen im Urlaub'), integrated into the front panel.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, integrated with the main structure, no overhangs or decorative features.
